series_metadata.series_description: Various payment types (checks, credit cards, etc.) issued for payment of services are returned by the bank, but are subsequently paid. The Tax Distribution Section is notified and a letter is sent to the customer requesting payment. Once payment is received, no further collection action is taken.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the returned item has been paid in full and cleared through the office of the Attorney General. Destroy 2 years thereafter providing audited by Auditor of the State and audit report released., Paper: Shred
